import React, { useState } from 'react'; const DashboardAdmin = () => { const [kataKunciPencarian, setKataKunciPencarian] = useState(''); const [produkAdmin] = useState([ { id: '#001', foto: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1606890737304-57a1ca8a5b62?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80', nama: 'Black Forest Cake', kategori: 'Kue Ulang Tahun', harga: 'Rp 150.000', badgeBg: '#e0e7ff', badgeColor: '#3730a3' }, { id: '#002', foto: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1571115177098-24edf3e00b65?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80', nama: 'Tiramisu Dessert Box', kategori: 'Dessert Box', harga: 'Rp 45.000', badgeBg: '#dcfce7', badgeColor: '#166534' }, { id: '#003', foto: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1605335967732-2b6389fccb8c?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80', nama: 'Nastar Keju Premium', kategori: 'Kue Kering', harga: 'Rp 120.000', badgeBg: '#fef3c7', badgeColor: '#92400e' } ]); const produkDifilter = produkAdmin.filter(item => item.nama.toLowerCase().includes(kataKunciPencarian.toLowerCase()) ); return (
